title: Roraimanthus imthurnianus
taxonomy: Roraimanthus imthurnianus is a species of flowering plant in the family Bromeliaceae. It is native to the Guiana Shield in South America. The plant has been classified as a member of the genus Roraimanthus, which is a small genus of bromeliads. The classification of Roraimanthus imthurnianus is still a subject of study and research. Further taxonomic analysis is needed to confirm its classification within the Bromeliaceae family.
